---
title: "AI Portfolio"
description: "Minimal academic AI portfolio built with Quarto"
page-layout: article
---

Welcome to the portfolio. This site showcases research notes, blog posts, and small reproducible projects rendered with Quarto and Jupyter.

## Highlights
- Math-ready via MathJax: $E = mc^2$ renders inline and $$\nabla \cdot \mathbf{E} = \frac{\rho}{\varepsilon_0}$$ renders as display math.
- Code folding and table of contents are enabled for readability.
- Blog posts and projects are executed notebooks for reproducibility.

## Sections
- [Blog](blog/index.qmd): short notes and updates.
- [Projects](projects/index.qmd): concise reproducible demos.

## Sample Code
```{python}
import numpy as np
np.random.seed(42)
values = np.linspace(0, 1, 5)
values_squared = values**2
values_squared
```
